User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user's core identity in the system, primarily for linking user-specific data to an external authentication system. Contains basic information not managed by the external auth.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The primary email address associated with the user account.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user account details.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the user's last login.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores detailed professional and personal information provided by the user, used for AI analysis and tailoring.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User this profile belongs to. (Relationship: User 1:1 UserProfile)

email.description: The user's primary email address, primarily for display and consistency, linked to the User entity.

phone.description: Optional phone number for the user.

preferredRoles.description: A list of job roles the user is actively seeking or prefers.

preferredLocations.description: A list of geographical locations where the user prefers to work.

yearsOfExperience.description: Total years of professional experience the user has.

currentOrLastJobTitle.description: The user's current or most recent job title.

keySkills.description: A list of the user's most relevant professional skills.

industriesOfInterest.description: A list of industries the user is interested in working for.

salaryExpectation.description: Optional salary expectation for the user, in a standard currency (e.g., USD annual equivalent).

workModePreference.description: User's preferred work mode (remote, hybrid, or onsite).

profileCompletenessScore.description: A calculated score indicating how complete the user's profile is (0-100).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user profile.

Resume.title: Resume
Resume.description: Stores metadata about a user's uploaded resume document (e.g., PDF/DOCX). The actual content is stored in Cloud Storage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Resume entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this resume. (Relationship: User 1:N Resume)

fileName.description: Original file name of the uploaded resume.

storagePath.description: Path to the resume file in Cloud Storage.

isPrimary.description: Indicates if this is the user's primary resume for analysis.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the resume file was uploaded.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resume record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the resume record.

ParsedResumeData.title: ParsedResumeData
ParsedResumeData.description: Stores the AI-parsed structured data extracted from an uploaded resume, enabling deeper analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ParsedResumeData entity.

resumeId.description: Reference to the Resume document this data was parsed from. (Relationship: Resume 1:1 ParsedResumeData)

userId.description: Reference to the User who owns this parsed resume data. (Relationship: User 1:N ParsedResumeData)

headline.description: Professional headline or current job title extracted from the resume.

summary.description: Professional summary or objective extracted from the resume.

skills.description: A list of skills extracted from the resume.

experienceIds.description: References to individual ParsedResumeExperience entries. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeExperience)

educationIds.description: References to individual ParsedResumeEducation entries. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeEducation)

certificationIds.description: References to individual ParsedResumeCertification entries. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeCertification)

projectIds.description: References to individual ParsedResumeProject entries. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeProject)

parsedAt.description: Timestamp when the resume data was last parsed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the parsed resume data record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the parsed resume data record.

ParsedResumeExperience.title: ParsedResumeExperience
ParsedResumeExperience.description: Represents a single work experience entry parsed from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ParsedResumeExperience entity.

parsedResumeDataId.description: Reference to the ParsedResumeData this experience belongs to. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeExperience)

location.description: Location of the company or work for this experience.

endDate.description: End date of this experience (optional, if current).

descriptionBullets.description: Key responsibilities and achievements as a list of bullet points.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the experience record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the experience record.

ParsedResumeEducation.title: ParsedResumeEducation
ParsedResumeEducation.description: Represents a single education entry parsed from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ParsedResumeEducation entity.

parsedResumeDataId.description: Reference to the ParsedResumeData this education belongs to. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeEducation)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the education record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the education record.

ParsedResumeCertification.title: ParsedResumeCertification
ParsedResumeCertification.description: Represents a single certification parsed from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ParsedResumeCertification entity.

parsedResumeDataId.description: Reference to the ParsedResumeData this certification belongs to. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeCertification)

dateIssued.description: Date the certification was issued or obtained.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the certification record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the certification record.

ParsedResumeProject.title: ParsedResumeProject
ParsedResumeProject.description: Represents a single project entry parsed from a resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ParsedResumeProject entity.

parsedResumeDataId.description: Reference to the ParsedResumeData this project belongs to. (Relationship: ParsedResumeData 1:N ParsedResumeProject)

description.description: Description of the project, including achievements and technologies.

url.description: URL to the project (e.g., GitHub, portfolio link).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the project record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the project record.

Job.title: Job
Job.description: Stores the normalized data of a job posting, imported by the user for analysis and tracking.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Job entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who imported this job. (Relationship: User 1:N Job)

sourceUrl.description: The URL from which the job was imported, if applicable.

company.description: The name of the company offering the job.

location.description: The geographical location of the job.

employmentType.description: Type of employment (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Contract).

description.description: The full, raw job description text.

responsibilities.description: A list of key responsibilities for the role.

requiredSkills.description: A list of skills explicitly marked as required for the job.

preferredSkills.description: A list of skills marked as preferred or advantageous for the job.

seniority.description: The level of seniority for the role (e.g., Junior, Mid-level, Senior, Lead).

applicationUrl.description: The direct URL to apply for the job, if detectable.

importedAt.description: Timestamp when the job was imported into the system.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the job record.

UserSavedJob.title: UserSavedJob
UserSavedJob.description: Tracks the status and user-specific details for a saved job, forming the core of the application tracker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserSavedJob entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who saved this job. (Relationship: User 1:N UserSavedJob)

jobId.description: Reference to the Job that was saved. (Relationship: Job 1:N UserSavedJob)

status.description: Current application status of the job for the user (e.g., saved, applied, interview).

appliedDate.description: The date when the user applied for this job, if applicable.

notes.description: Personal notes related to this job application.

reminderDate.description: A specific date set by the user for a reminder related to this job.

followUpFlag.description: A flag indicating if a follow-up is needed for this job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was first saved by the user.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the saved job's status or details.

JobAnalysis.title: JobAnalysis
JobAnalysis.description: Stores the results of AI analysis performed on a specific job, comparing it against the user's profile and/or resume.

id.description: Unique identifier for the JobAnalysis entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom this analysis was performed. (Relationship: User 1:N JobAnalysis)

jobId.description: Reference to the Job that was analyzed. (Relationship: Job 1:N JobAnalysis)

resumeId.description: Optional reference to the specific Resume used for this analysis, if applicable. (Relationship: Resume 1:N JobAnalysis)

matchScore.description: An AI-calculated score (0-100) indicating how well the user matches the job requirements.

strengths.description: A list of skills or experiences where the user strongly matches the job.

gaps.description: A list of skills or experiences identified as missing or weak for the job.

recommendationSummary.description: A short, AI-generated summary of recommendations for improving chances.

nextActions.description: Actionable suggestions generated by AI (e.g., 'Update resume bullet point X').

analysisDate.description: Timestamp when the job analysis was performed.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the analysis record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the analysis record.

ResumeOptimization.title: ResumeOptimization
ResumeOptimization.description: Stores AI-generated suggestions for optimizing a user's resume for a specific job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ResumeOptimization entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom this optimization was performed. (Relationship: User 1:N ResumeOptimization)

jobId.description: Reference to the Job for which the resume was optimized. (Relationship: Job 1:N ResumeOptimization)

originalResumeId.description: Reference to the original Resume document that was optimized. (Relationship: Resume 1:N ResumeOptimization)

keywordSuggestions.description: A list of ATS-friendly keywords suggested for the resume based on the job description.

revisedSummarySuggestion.description: AI-generated suggestion for an improved professional summary.

revisedBulletSuggestionIds.description: References to individual RevisedBulletSuggestion entries for experience and responsibilities. (Relationship: ResumeOptimization 1:N RevisedBulletSuggestion)

atsImprovementNotes.description: General notes or tips from AI for improving the resume's Applicant Tracking System compatibility.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the resume optimization suggestions were generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the optimization record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the optimization record.

RevisedBulletSuggestion.title: RevisedBulletSuggestion
RevisedBulletSuggestion.description: Represents an AI-generated suggestion for improving a single bullet point in a resume for a specific job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RevisedBulletSuggestion entity.

resumeOptimizationId.description: Reference to the ResumeOptimization this suggestion belongs to. (Relationship: ResumeOptimization 1:N RevisedBulletSuggestion)

originalContext.description: The original bullet point or phrase that was optimized.

suggestedBullet.description: The AI-generated improved version of the bullet point.

relevanceScore.description: An optional score indicating the relevance or impact of this suggestion (0-100).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the suggestion record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the suggestion record.

CoverLetter.title: CoverLetter
CoverLetter.description: Stores AI-generated, tailored cover letters for specific jobs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the CoverLetter entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who generated this cover letter. (Relationship: User 1:N CoverLetter)

jobId.description: Reference to the Job for which the cover letter was generated. (Relationship: Job 1:N CoverLetter)

coverLetterText.description: The full text of the generated cover letter.

tone.description: The selected tone for the cover letter (e.g., professional, confident, concise).

strongPointsUsed.description: A list of strong points from the user's profile/resume that were highlighted in the cover letter.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cover letter was generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the cover letter record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cover letter record.

InterviewPrep.title: InterviewPrep
InterviewPrep.description: Stores AI-generated interview questions and answer guidance for a specific job.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InterviewPrep entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom this interview preparation was generated. (Relationship: User 1:N InterviewPrep)

jobId.description: Reference to the Job for which interview preparation was created. (Relationship: Job 1:N InterviewPrep)

behavioralQuestionIds.description: References to individual InterviewQuestion entries categorized as behavioral. (Relationship: InterviewPrep 1:N InterviewQuestion)

technicalQuestionIds.description: References to individual InterviewQuestion entries categorized as technical. (Relationship: InterviewPrep 1:N InterviewQuestion)

roleFitQuestionIds.description: References to individual InterviewQuestion entries categorized as role-fit. (Relationship: InterviewPrep 1:N InterviewQuestion)

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the interview preparation materials were generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the interview prep record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the interview prep record.

InterviewQuestion.title: InterviewQuestion
InterviewQuestion.description: Represents a single AI-generated interview question with guidance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InterviewQuestion entity.

interviewPrepId.description: Reference to the InterviewPrep entity this question belongs to. (Relationship: InterviewPrep 1:N InterviewQuestion)

type.description: The category of the interview question (behavioral, technical, role-fit).

questionText.description: The text of the interview question.

guidanceBullets.description: A list of bullet points providing guidance on how to answer the question.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the question record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the question record.

Reminder.title: Reminder
Reminder.description: Manages user-specific reminders for job applications and other tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Reminder entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who set this reminder. (Relationship: User 1:N Reminder)

userSavedJobId.description: Optional reference to the UserSavedJob if this reminder is job-specific. (Relationship: UserSavedJob 1:N Reminder)

type.description: The type of reminder (e.g., follow-up, interview, profile-completeness, general).

message.description: The text content of the reminder.

remindAt.description: The date and time when the reminder should trigger.

isDismissed.description: Flag indicating if the user has dismissed or completed this reminder.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the reminder was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the reminder record.

LearningRecommendation.title: LearningRecommendation
LearningRecommendation.description: Stores AI-generated recommendations for skills to learn and associated learning resources.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningRecommendation entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User for whom these recommendations were generated. (Relationship: User 1:N LearningRecommendation)

jobId.description: Optional reference to the Job for which these recommendations were made (e.g., based on missing skills for that job). (Relationship: Job 1:N LearningRecommendation)

missingSkills.description: A list of skills identified as missing from the user's profile for a specific context.

recommendedSkillIds.description: References to individual RecommendedSkill entries. (Relationship: LearningRecommendation 1:N RecommendedSkill)

resourceIds.description: References to individual LearningResource entries. (Relationship: LearningRecommendation 1:N LearningResource)

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the learning recommendations were generated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recommendation record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the recommendation record.

RecommendedSkill.title: RecommendedSkill
RecommendedSkill.description: Represents a single skill recommended for learning, potentially with a priority.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RecommendedSkill entity.

learningRecommendationId.description: Reference to the LearningRecommendation this skill belongs to. (Relationship: LearningRecommendation 1:N RecommendedSkill)

skillName.description: The name of the recommended skill.

priority.description: A numerical value indicating the importance or priority of learning this skill (e.g., 1 for high priority).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the skill recommendation record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the skill recommendation record.

LearningResource.title: LearningResource
LearningResource.description: Represents a single learning resource suggested for skill development.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningResource entity.

learningRecommendationId.description: Reference to the LearningRecommendation this resource belongs to. (Relationship: LearningRecommendation 1:N LearningResource)

url.description: URL to access the learning resource.

type.description: Type of resource (e.g., free, paid, certification, article, video).

isAffiliate.description: Flag indicating if the URL is an affiliate link.

description.description: A brief description of the learning resource.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the resource record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the resource record.

ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: Stores the context and metadata for a chat conversation with the AI career assistant.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatSession entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who initiated this chat session. (Relationship: User 1:N ChatSession)

startTime.description: Timestamp when the chat session started.

endTime.description: Timestamp when the chat session ended (optional, if still active).

contextJobId.description: Optional reference to a Job if the chat is specific to a job application. (Relationship: Job 1:N ChatSession)

contextResumeId.description: Optional reference to a Resume if the chat involves resume-specific context. (Relationship: Resume 1:N ChatSession)

messageIds.description: References to individual ChatMessage entries within this session. (Relationship: ChatSession 1:N ChatMessage)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the chat session record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the chat session record.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within an AI career assistant chat session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

chatSessionId.description: Reference to the ChatSession this message belongs to. (Relationship: ChatSession 1:N ChatMessage)

role.description: The role of the sender (e.g., user, assistant).

content.description: The text content of the message.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the message record.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Stores details about notifications sent to the user (e.g., push notifications, in-app messages).

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notification entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User to whom this notification was sent. (Relationship: User 1:N Notification)

type.description: The type of notification (e.g., job-reminder, follow-up, interview-reminder, profile-completeness, saved-jobs-not-applied).

message.description: The message content of the notification.

sentAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was sent.

isRead.description: Flag indicating if the user has read or viewed the notification.

targetUrl.description: An optional URL within the app to navigate to when the notification is tapped/clicked.

relatedEntityId.description: Optional reference to a related entity (e.g., ReminderId, UserSavedJobId) that triggered this notification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the notification record.

FeatureFlag.title: FeatureFlag
FeatureFlag.description: Manages global feature flags for controlling application behavior and feature visibility.

id.description: Unique identifier for the FeatureFlag entity, typically the programmatic name of the flag.

name.description: A human-readable name for the feature flag.

description.description: A description of what the feature flag controls.

isEnabled.description: Boolean value indicating if the feature is enabled (true) or disabled (false).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the feature flag's status.

AuditLog.title: AuditLog
AuditLog.description: Records important system or user actions for security, debugging, and operational insights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AuditLog entity.

userId.description: Optional reference to the User who performed the action, if applicable. (Relationship: User 1:N AuditLog)

entityType.description: The type of entity affected by the action (e.g., 'Job', 'UserProfile').

entityId.description: The unique identifier of the entity affected by the action.

details.description: Additional arbitrary JSON details about the action (e.g., '{"field":"oldValue->newValue"}') represented as a string.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the audit log record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the audit log record.

definition.description: Top-level collection for user accounts. Access is restricted to the owning user identified by `{userId}` matching `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Stores detailed profile information for a specific user. This is a subcollection with a singular document ('profile') directly under the user's path. Authorization is by parent path: `{userId}` matching `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Collection for user-uploaded resume metadata. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for querying flexibility, though primary authorization is via the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific resume document.

definition.description: Stores the AI-parsed structured data from a specific resume. This is a subcollection with a singular document ('parsedResumeData') directly under the resume's path. Includes denormalized 'userId' for querying, and 'resumeId' for consistency. Authorization is via the parent path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent resume document.

definition.description: Collection for individual work experience entries parsed from a resume. Authorization is inherited from the parent `parsedResumeData` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent resume document.

params.name: experienceId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific parsed experience entry.

definition.description: Collection for individual education entries parsed from a resume. Authorization is inherited from the parent `parsedResumeData` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent resume document.

params.name: educationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific parsed education entry.

definition.description: Collection for individual certification entries parsed from a resume. Authorization is inherited from the parent `parsedResumeData` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent resume document.

params.name: certificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific parsed certification entry.

definition.description: Collection for individual project entries parsed from a resume. Authorization is inherited from the parent `parsedResumeData` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent resume document.

params.name: projectId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific parsed project entry.

definition.description: Collection for job postings imported by a user. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' for querying flexibility, though primary authorization is via the path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: jobId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific job document.

definition.description: Collection for user-specific tracking details of saved jobs. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'jobId' for querying flexibility and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userSavedJobId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific saved job entry.

definition.description: Collection for AI analysis results of a job against a user's profile/resume. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'jobId', and 'resumeId' for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: jobAnalysisId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific job analysis record.

definition.description: Collection for AI-generated resume optimization suggestions for a specific job. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'jobId', and 'originalResumeId' for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeOptimizationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific resume optimization record.

definition.description: Collection for AI-generated suggestions for individual resume bullet points. Authorization is inherited from the parent `resumeOptimization` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: resumeOptimizationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent resume optimization record.

params.name: bulletSuggestionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific bullet point suggestion.

definition.description: Collection for AI-generated cover letters tailored for specific jobs. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'jobId' for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: coverLetterId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific cover letter record.

definition.description: Collection for AI-generated interview preparation materials for specific jobs. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'jobId' for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: interviewPrepId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific interview preparation record.

definition.description: Collection for individual AI-generated interview questions and guidance. Authorization is inherited from the parent `interviewPrep` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: interviewPrepId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent interview preparation record.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific interview question.

definition.description: Collection for user-specific reminders related to job applications or other tasks. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'userSavedJobId' (optional) for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: reminderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific reminder record.

definition.description: Collection for AI-generated learning recommendations. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'jobId' (optional) for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific learning recommendation record.

definition.description: Collection for individual skills recommended for learning. Authorization is inherited from the parent `learningRecommendation` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent learning recommendation record.

params.name: skillId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific recommended skill.

definition.description: Collection for individual learning resources suggested for skill development. Authorization is inherited from the parent `learningRecommendation` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: recommendationId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent learning recommendation record.

params.name: resourceId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific learning resource.

definition.description: Collection for AI career assistant chat sessions. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId', 'contextJobId' (optional), and 'contextResumeId' (optional) for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific chat session.

definition.description: Collection for individual messages within a chat session. Authorization is inherited from the parent `chatSession` path.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: chatSessionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent chat session.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific chat message.

definition.description: Collection for user-specific notifications. Access is restricted to the owning user. Includes denormalized 'userId' and 'relatedEntityId' (optional) for querying and authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific notification record.

definition.description: Top-level collection for global feature flags. Designed for application-wide settings and feature toggling. Read access can be public or restricted to authenticated users; write access is typically restricted to administrators (not defined by user path).

params.name: flagId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific feature flag (e.g., 'newDashboardEnabled').

definition.description: Top-level collection for system-generated audit logs. Access is typically restricted to internal system processes (writes) and administrators (reads). Includes 'userId' (optional) for reference, not authorization on the log itself.

params.name: logId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific audit log entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure for CareerPilot AI prioritizes secure, scalable, and debuggable access by strictly adhering to the core design principles and strategy mandates. The fundamental approach is a hierarchical, user-centric data model, where almost all user-specific data resides within a top-level `/users/{userId}` document subtree.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** This structure achieves authorization independence by embedding the user's unique ID (`userId`) directly into the Firestore path for all user-owned data. For example, `/users/{userId}/resumes/{resumeId}` ensures that `request.auth.uid` can be directly compared against the `{userId}` wildcard in Firestore security rules. This eliminates the need for expensive and potentially complex `get()` calls to parent documents to determine ownership or permissions. For top-level user subcollections (e.g., `/users/{userId}/jobs`, `/users/{userId}/savedJobs`), the `userId` is also redundantly stored as a field within the document itself. While the path provides primary authorization for rules, this explicit `userId` field aids in collection group queries and strengthens data consistency and debuggability without compromising authorization independence.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** Secure `list` operations are inherently supported by the path-based ownership model. When a user queries for their data (e.g., all their jobs or saved jobs), the query path will always begin with `/users/{request.auth.uid}/`. Firestore security rules will match this path, automatically restricting the results to only the current user's data. This ensures that security rules act as enforcers, not filters, and that client-side queries will only ever retrieve authorized data. Structural segregation further enhances QAPs; each subcollection under a user's path (e.g., `resumes`, `jobs`, `savedJobs`) maintains a homogeneous security posture (owner-only access), simplifying rules and preventing accidental data exposure.

**Structural Segregation & Access Modeling:** All user-specific data maintains a 'Private Data' access model, where only the owning user can access their documents. Global configuration, such as `featureFlags`, is placed in a separate top-level collection (`/featureFlags`) with distinct, broader read permissions, clearly segregating data with different security requirements. This avoids mixing public/private data within the same collection. The use of hierarchical paths for `1:N` relationships (e.g., `/users/{userId}/resumes/{resumeId}/parsedResumeData/experiences/{experienceId}`) consistently applies ownership down the chain.

**Data Clarity & Predictability:** Consistent semantic naming for collections and wildcards (e.g., `{userId}`, `{jobId}`) is enforced. Explicit status fields (e.g., `isPrimary`, `status`, `isDismissed`) are used to model states clearly. Timestamps (`createdAt`, `updatedAt`) are included in all entities for auditing and data freshness. Dynamic keys are avoided, promoting a predictable schema.
